issues.detail: The skill file lacks runnable code or concrete procedures, making it less actionable.
Only a reference table is provided; no realistic code demonstrations are included.

scenarios.name: Starting a new notifications feature
scenarios.rationale: Baseline jumps straight to design and tech-stack choices without naming agent skills or surfacing assumptions; treatment applies the documented lifecycle (idea-refine, spec-driven-development, planning-and-task-breakdown, etc.) and uses the explicit Surface Assumptions, Manage Confusion, and Scope Discipline behaviors.

scenarios.name: Hot production bug fix workflow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a reasonable incident playbook but never references named skills or the not-every-task-needs-every-skill principle; treatment limits the chain to debugging-and-error-recovery, test-driven-development, and code-review-and-quality and applies verify-don't-assume and scope-discipline by name.
